basePrompt: Completely original cute collectible creature in simple 1990s anime style. Small rounded plush-like body, very large expressive eyes with star-shaped sparkles, tiny stubby limbs, clean bold black outlines, flat vibrant colors with minimal shading, soft and friendly atmosphere, simple readable silhouette, high quality 2D anime illustration on clean background.
avoid: Do not copy existing franchise characters, names, logos, symbols, outfits or exact creature shapes. Avoid realistic rendering, 3D, heavy textures, text, watermark and brand references.
